steps.title: Focus on both dates
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize when Morales collected both samples. The relevant notes are the February 1, 1930 collection of Erigeron maximus and the November 23, 1926 collection of Brickellia diffusa.

steps.title: Check the note use
steps.content: Choice A focuses on family and location, not dates. Choice B gives both dates and shows their order. Choice C gives only the Erigeron maximus date. Choice D focuses on where samples can be viewed now. The answer is B.
